data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the compliance review workflow, indicating a gap in the testing process. Without specific evidence or endpoints that demonstrate this workflow, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of validation for the post-access supervisor/compliance review workflow.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
